title: Trump threatens Iran with escalation, including strikes on civilian and nuclear infrastructure
subhead: After two weeks of strikes on Iran that yielded no progress, US President Donald Trump raised the possibility of targeting uranium enrichment sites beneath the Kolang mountain in central Iran.

subhead: In a series of articles published in July, Le Monde detailed the central role played by this site in the 'Libertine' rapes case, in which 19 men were indicted for sexual crimes involving torture or acts of barbarity.

title: Fire ravages forest in southwestern France as thousands evacuated
subhead: Thousands have been evacuated from a town in Gironde in southwestern France after a fast-moving fire broke out on Wednesday.

title: Tour de France 2026: The mountains, a dreaded terrain for sprinters struggling to make time
subhead: After crossing four mountain ranges, riders are tackling the Alps on stage 18 between Voiron and Orcières-Merlette. For the sprinters, who suffer as soon as the road rises, a tough day awaits at the back of the peloton.

title: NGOs appeal to French state to stop economic support for Israel's occupation of Palestine
subhead: Five NGOs filed a legal appeal to require the French government to prevent any economic activity that might support Israel's settlement of Palestinian territories. The unprecedented legal move is based on the International Court of Justice's 2024 advisory opinion.

subhead: France has decided to ban those under 15 from major platforms such as Instagram and TikTok. The country is following a global trend that has gained momentum in recent years.

title: How Bernard Arnault works to keep his media outlets in line
subhead: 'Bernard Arnault's Empire' (4/6). Since the 1990s, the CEO of LVMH has built a small media galaxy in print and radio, which he uses to convey his ideas and tastes, but also to promote his brands.

title: Despite living 'like a walking dead man,' South Africa's Thabiso Zulu continues crusade against ANC corruption
subhead: For nearly a decade, the 44-year-old man has lived like a hunted animal. He sleeps in a different place almost every night and only shares meeting locations at the last moment.
